refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify compliance with the customer-defined limit.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated high-reliability network link with QoS prioritization.
DP3: Integrate real-time packet loss monitoring and feedback control.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication protocol and network link quality.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically isolates communication quality management within the protocol layer, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
Assumes availability of sufficient processing resources for adaptive protocol.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding latency constraints explicitly in FR refinement to balance packet loss and responsiveness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and hardware components responsible for teleoperation communication and control.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data packets over the network.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics and status.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Interface to receive teleoperation commands and tasks.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused containment of teleoperation communication logic.
Vehicle module primarily physical control, low containment relevance.
Highest containment score; module is designed for teleoperation communication and control.
Safety services interface with communication but do not contain teleoperation communication logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Teleoperation module fully encapsulates the adaptive communication protocol and packet loss management, minimizing diffusion and maximizing ownership clarity.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution module if communication logic is duplicated.
Interface coordination risks with Network Link and Telemetry modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure strict interface definitions and ownership boundaries to prevent diffusion of communication logic across modules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP directly addresses the refined FR by implementing adaptive communication to meet packet loss requirements.

diffusion_risks: Risk of partial implementation of communication protocol in NGHE Solution module causing diffusion.
Need to monitor interface consistency between Teleoperation and Network Link.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment of DP with minimal diffusion risk if interfaces are well managed.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring packet loss metrics via Telemetry interface and validating against customer limits.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility to Teleoperation module for teleoperation communication quality.

recommended_revisions: Add latency and responsiveness constraints to FR to balance packet loss and teleoperation performance.
Define interface contracts explicitly to avoid diffusion risks.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently refines the FR, selects a suitable DP, and assigns a clear IM boundary with manageable risks. Verification and ownership are clear.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

revise.why: To incorporate latency and responsiveness constraints for balanced teleoperation performance.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Processing resources are sufficient for adaptive protocol.
open_risks: Interface coordination between Teleoperation and other modules.
evidence_needed: Packet loss measurements under representative network conditions.
Latency and responsiveness metrics during teleoperation.
